code:
import io
import string
import list

let line1_opt = io.read_line()
let line2_opt = io.read_line()

match line1_opt
when Some(l1)
  match line2_opt
  when Some(l2)
    let tokens = string.split_whitespace(l1)
    mut nums: List<Int> = []
    mut i = 0
    while i < tokens.len()
      match tokens.get(i)
      when Some(s)
        match string.parse_int(s)
        when Some(n)
          nums = list.push(nums, n)
        when None
          ()
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end

    match string.parse_int(string.trim(l2))
    when Some(target)
      mut lo = 0
      mut hi = nums.len()
      mut found = 0 - 1
      while lo < hi
        let mid = (lo + hi) / 2
        match nums.get(mid)
        when Some(v)
          if v == target
            found = mid
            lo = hi
          else if v < target
            lo = mid + 1
          else
            hi = mid
          end
        when None
          lo = hi
        end
      end
      if found >= 0
        print("index=#{found}")
      else
        print("not_found")
      end
    when None
      print("not_found")
    end
  when None
    print("not_found")
  end
when None
  print("not_found")
end
